'''paluzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatromechanist|iatromechanist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatromechanist|iatromechanist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| paluzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pælizith|pælizith]] || [[word:pælizij|pælizij]] || [[word:pælizish|pælizish]] || [[word:pælizi|pælizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:paluluzuth|paluluzuth]] || [[word:paluluzuj|paluluzuj]] || [[word:paluluzush|paluluzush]] || [[word:paluluzu|paluluzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:paluzuth|paluzuth]] || [[word:paluzuj|paluzuj]] || [[word:paluzush|paluzush]] || [[word:paluzu|paluzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:palufzuth|palufzuth]] || [[word:palufzuj|palufzuj]] || [[word:palufzush|palufzush]] || [[word:palufzuf|palufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:paluzuthu|paluzuthu]] || [[word:paluzuju|paluzuju]] || [[word:paluzushu|paluzushu]] || [[word:paluzuku|paluzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:paluzuth|paluzuth]] || [[word:paluzuj|paluzuj]] || [[word:paluzush|paluzush]] || [[word:paluzu|paluzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:paluzuthul|paluzuthul]] || [[word:paluzujul|paluzujul]] || [[word:paluzushul|paluzushul]] || [[word:paluzukul|paluzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:paluzuthuthu|paluzuthuthu]] || [[word:paluzujuju|paluzujuju]] || [[word:paluzushushu|paluzushushu]] || [[word:paluzuku|paluzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:paluzuthun|paluzuthun]] || [[word:paluzujun|paluzujun]] || [[word:paluzushun|paluzushun]] || [[word:paluzukun|paluzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:paluzuthuoro|paluzuthuoro]] || [[word:paluzujuoro|paluzujuoro]] || [[word:paluzushuoro|paluzushuoro]] || [[word:paluzukuoro|paluzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
